name: graphAssess
label: Query security graph (threat posture)
description: Ask the Whisper security graph (3.6B+ nodes of DNS/BGP/threat intelligence) for a labelled threat posture and vendor/operator identity of a hostname or IP - whisper.assess (malicious/benign label, severity band, evidence) plus whisper.identify (who operates it). A direct Cypher read, bound server-side as a $-parameter. Keyless - no API key needed.
